articles.title: Man killed after horse-drawn carriage bolts and flips near popular New York City tourist destination - Fox News
articles.description: An 18-year-old Indian tourist died after spooked horse pulling carriage through Central Park bolts, striking another carriage and overturning Wednesday.
articles.content: An 18-year-old man was killed Wednesday after a horse-drawn carriage became startled and bolted through New York City's Central Park before colliding with another carriage and overturning, according … [+3883 chars]
